revision.comment: Undid revision 996791156 by [[Special:Contributions/Paine Ellsworth|Paine Ellsworth]] ([[User talk:Paine Ellsworth|talk]]) this wording addition needs discussion since it wasn't discussed and I don't agree with it (and how I didn't notice it for over a year ... not sure)
revision.text: <noinclude>{{hatnote|This rcat template is automatically added to all new redirects that result from page moves; it must be added manually to older redirects when appropriate.}}{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from move |name=From a page move |from=a page that has been moved (renamed) |info=This page was kept as a redirect to avoid breaking links, both internal and external, that may have been made to the old page name. |all category=Redirects from moves }}<includeonly>{{R from move/except}}</includeonly><noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:R_from_move]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{hatnote|This rcat template is automatically added to all new redirects that result from page moves; it must be added manually to older redirects when appropriate.}}{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from move |name=From a page move |from=a page that has been moved (renamed) |info=This page was kept as a redirect to avoid breaking links, both internal and external, that may have been made to the old page name. |all category=Redirects from moves }}<includeonly>{{R from move/except}}</includeonly><noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{hatnote|This rcat template is automatically added to all new redirects that result from page moves; it must be added manually to older redirects when appropriate.}}{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from move |name=From a page move |from=a page that has been moved (renamed) |info=This page was kept as a redirect to avoid breaking links, both internal and external, that may have been made to the old page name. |all category=Redirects from moves }}<includeonly>{{R from move/except}}</includeonly><noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.text: <noinclude>{{hatnote|This rcat template is automatically added to all new redirects that result from page moves; it must be added manually to older redirects when appropriate.}}{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from move |name=From a page move |from=a page that has been moved (renamed) |info=This page was kept as a redirect to avoid breaking links, both internal and external, that may have been made to the old page name. |all category=Redirects from moves }}<includeonly>{{R from move/except}}</includeonly><noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{hatnote|This rcat template is automatically added to all new redirects that result from page moves; it must be added manually to older redirects when appropriate.}}{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from move
  |name=From a page move
  |from=a page that has been moved (renamed)
  |info=This page was kept as a redirect to avoid breaking links, both internal and external, that may have been made to the old page name.
  |all category=Redirects from moves
}}<includeonly>{{R from move/except}}</includeonly><noinclude>

{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
